title: South Button Island National Park
tagline: South Button Island National Park — wildlife reserve of Andaman & Nicobar

heroImage.alt: South Button Island National Park, Andaman & Nicobar

overview.short: South Button Island National Park is a national park located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands off the coast of India.
overview.description: South Button Island National Park is a national park located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands off the coast of India. The total area of this protected island is about 5 km2 (2 mi2), which makes it the smallest national park in India. Along with the neighbouring islands of North Button and Middle Button, both also national parks, it forms part of the Rani Jhansi Marine National Park off the coast of South Andaman Island.

topPlaces.name: Middle Button Island National Park
topPlaces.description: Middle Button Island National Park is an Indian national park located in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. The park was created in 1979 and is situated about 200 km (124 mi) northeast of Port Blair, capital of the island group.

topPlaces.name: Button Islands (Andaman Islands)
topPlaces.description: Button Islands are a group of islands of the Andaman Islands. It belongs to the South Andaman administrative district, part of the Indian union territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

topPlaces.description: Outram Island is an island of the Andaman Islands. It belongs to the South Andaman administrative district, part of the Indian union territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

topPlaces.name: Strait Island
topPlaces.description: Strait Island is an island of the Andaman Islands. It belongs to the North and Middle Andaman administrative district, part of the Indian union territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit South Button Island National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit South Button Island National Park is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach South Button Island National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Veer Savarkar International Airport, Port Blair (72 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (1141 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for South Button Island National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of South Button Island National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in South Button Island National Park?
faq.a: Stays in South Button Island National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in South Button Island National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Middle Button Island National Park, Button Islands (Andaman Islands), Outram Island, Henry Lawrence Island, Strait Island.
